---
title: "05_environmental_data"
format: html
---

# Load Libraries
```{r}
library(microeco)
library(tidyverse)
```

# Run previous scripts to load in microtable objects

```{r}
source("scripts/02_import_mag_sylph_16s.R")
```


# Create environmental object

```{r}
t1 <- trans_env$new(dataset = mt_mag, env_cols = c(6:18), standardize = F, complete_na = T)
t1$data_env
t1$data_env$chla_24h_avg[1] <- t1$data_env |> 
    filter()
# Calculate differences between variables at different sampling dates
t1$cal_diff(group = "strat_season", method = "anova")
view(t1$res_diff)

# Calculate RDA plot
t1$cal_ordination(method = "dbRDA", use_measure = "bray")
t1$trans_ordination()
t1$plot_ordination(plot_color = "strat_season")
# the main results of RDA are related with the projection and angles between arrows
# adjust the length of the arrows to show them better
t1$trans_ordination(adjust_arrow_length = TRUE, max_perc_env = 1.5)
# t1$res_rda_trans is the transformed result for plotting
t1$plot_ordination(plot_color = "strat_season")
# Calculate correlation matrix
t1$cal_autocor(group = "strat_season")


```
